name: wxcode-admin-frost-glass
title: Frost Glass Admin
description: Glassmorphism operations dashboard — frosted translucent cards layered over a deep indigo-violet-teal gradient canvas. Signature style: backdrop-filter blur, 1px translucent borders, soft ambient shadows, cyan and violet accents on near-black. Use when the brief calls for a dark, premium, or futuristic analytics look.

query.en: Build me a dark glassmorphism analytics dashboard — frosted glass cards over a deep gradient, KPI tiles, inline chart, data table, and side panel. Cyan and violet accents.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a dark glassmorphism analytics dashboard — frosted glass cards over a deep gradient, KPI tiles, inline chart, data table, and side panel. Cyan and violet accents.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
